title: Add nav links for key sections, second WhatsApp number, and full venue address

requirements.summary: Add navigation links in SiteHeader for six sections with smooth-scroll anchors
acceptanceCriteria: The header nav (desktop and mobile) shows links: About Us, Our Banquet, Specialist, Decor, Event, Seminar & Conference
Clicking each link smooth-scrolls to the matching section anchor on the page
All six links are present in both the desktop nav bar and the mobile slide-out Sheet menu

file_operations.description: Add six new navigation links (About Us, Our Banquet, Specialist, Decor, Event, Seminar & Conference) to both the desktop nav and mobile Sheet menu. Each link must include a smooth-scroll handler that navigates to the corresponding section anchor (e.g., href='#about', href='#banquet', href='#specialist', href='#decor', href='#event', href='#seminar-conference'). Ensure the mobile Sheet closes after a link is clicked.

requirements.summary: Create five new page sections and ensure all six sections have matching id anchors
acceptanceCriteria: Each of the six sections exists on the page with a matching id anchor
About Us section retains its existing id anchor (e.g., id="about")
All new sections are rendered in App.tsx in a sensible order
Each new section has at least a heading and brief placeholder content consistent with the venue's greenery theme

file_operations.description: Ensure the AboutSection component includes id="about" on its root element to support smooth-scroll navigation from the header.

Create a new BanquetSection component with id="banquet" on the root element. Include a heading ('Our Banquet') and placeholder content describing the banquet hall's capacity, features, and amenities. Style consistently with the existing greenery theme using Tailwind utilities and theme tokens from index.css.

Create a new SpecialistSection component with id="specialist" on the root element. Include a heading ('Specialist') and placeholder content highlighting the venue's expert team or specialized services (e.g., event coordinators, decorators). Use greenery theme colors and consistent spacing.

Create a new DecorSection component with id="decor" on the root element. Include a heading ('Decor') and placeholder content showcasing decoration services, themes, or styles available at the venue. Maintain greenery theme styling and use appropriate Tailwind classes.

Create a new EventSection component with id="event" on the root element. Include a heading ('Event') and placeholder content describing the types of events hosted (weddings, receptions, parties). Apply greenery theme tokens and consistent section layout.

Create a new SeminarConferenceSection component with id="seminar-conference" on the root element. Include a heading ('Seminar & Conference') and placeholder content highlighting facilities for corporate events, seminars, and conferences. Use greenery theme colors and spacing consistent with other sections.

Import the five new section components (BanquetSection, SpecialistSection, DecorSection, EventSection, SeminarConferenceSection) and render them in a logical order within the main page layout, after the existing sections. Ensure each section is placed so the id anchors work correctly with the header navigation links.

requirements.summary: Add second WhatsApp number to brand constants and display in contact areas
acceptanceCriteria: brand.ts exports a second WhatsApp number: 9794416439
Both WhatsApp numbers are displayed in ContactBookingSection
Both WhatsApp numbers are displayed in SiteFooter
Each WhatsApp number is a clickable wa.me link opening the respective chat

file_operations.description: Add a second WhatsApp number field (e.g., whatsappSecondary: '9794416439') to the BRAND constant object. Ensure the existing whatsapp field remains unchanged.

Display both BRAND.whatsapp and BRAND.whatsappSecondary as clickable WhatsApp links (wa.me URLs). Label the second number clearly (e.g., 'WhatsApp 2' or 'Alternate WhatsApp'). Maintain consistent styling with the greenery theme.

Display both BRAND.whatsapp and BRAND.whatsappSecondary in the footer contact info section. Each number should be a clickable wa.me link with appropriate labels (e.g., 'WhatsApp 1', 'WhatsApp 2'). Preserve the existing footer layout and greenery theme styling.

requirements.summary: Update venue address in brand constants and all display locations
acceptanceCriteria: The address in brand.ts is updated to: Avsar Vatika Marriage Hall, Dughara Chauraha, Rajwal Road, Khajani, Gorakhpur, UP – 273211
The updated address is displayed in SiteFooter
The updated address is displayed in ContactBookingSection
No old or placeholder address text remains visible

file_operations.description: Update the address field in the BRAND constant to: 'Avsar Vatika Marriage Hall, Dughara Chauraha, Rajwal Road, Khajani, Gorakhpur, UP – 273211'. Remove any old or placeholder address text.
Ensure the SiteFooter displays the updated BRAND.address. Verify no old address text is hardcoded or cached in the component.
Ensure the ContactBookingSection displays the updated BRAND.address. Verify no old address text is hardcoded or cached in the component.
